description: Classification of the entity that produced a signature. Paired with SignatureEnvelope.signer_type and SignerEntry.

anyOf.description: AI actor or autonomous software agent.
Real person signing in their personal capacity.
Corporate / collective entity signing on behalf of itself.
Automated software process (build pipelines, schedulers, etc.).
Representative signing on behalf of a principal under delegation.
External data source attesting to off-protocol facts.
Third party attesting to an event they observed but did not author.
Physical signing device (hardware security module, IoT sensor, etc.).
